title: Warnings and Errors Definitions
description: 统一的 warnings/errors 数组结构定义。错误码遵循全局统一口径：INVALID_ARGS / ASSET_NOT_FOUND / ACTOR_NOT_FOUND / LEVEL_NOT_FOUND / CLASS_NOT_FOUND / PROPERTY_NOT_ALLOWED / EDITOR_NOT_READY / BUILD_FAILED / SAVE_FAILED / VALIDATION_FAILED / DRY_RUN_REQUIRED / WRITE_SCOPE_EXCEEDED / READBACK_FAILED。

code.description: 错误码，例如 ASSET_NOT_FOUND / INVALID_ARGS / READBACK_FAILED 等

error_item.description: 单条错误，可以是纯字符串或结构化错误对象
